description: Small passerine - about 5 inches - with a short blunt blackish bill, a short drab tail, shape and behavior (slow flitting) of a vireo. Upperparts grayish green turning to gray on wings and darker gray on crown; underparts pale whitish with lemon-yellow wash, brightest on upper chest. Whitish, diffuse supercilium and as well as feathers under the dark eye, separated by a dark gray diffuse eye line and lore; pale gray tips to greater coverts forming the suggestion of a diffuse wingbar; olive edges to secondaries; darker gray wingtips (primaries).
